title: PropMatcher
description: A rule for matching OSM tag key-value pairs. Used by rulesets and style selectors.

key.description: The tag key to match. An exact string by default, or a regex pattern if keyOp is '~'.

keyOp.description: Key matching mode: '=' (exact match, default), 'in' (key is one of an array), or '~' (regex on key name).

op.description: Comparison operator. Defaults to '=' if value is present, 'exists' if no value.

value.description: The tag value to match. Can be a string, number, or array of strings (for 'in'/'!in'). Supports var() references.

allowNo.description: If true, also match when value is 'no'.
